name: Broccoli Bacon Quiche (Crustless)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook bacon until crisp; set aside.
3. Beat eggs with half-and-half and cheese.
4. Stir in broccoli, salt, garlic powder, and lemon pepper.
5. Crumble the bacon.
6. Stir half of the crumbled bacon into the egg mixture.
7. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
9. Top with remaining bacon.
